title: dryopteris vilis
intro: Dryopteris vilis, also known as the Rough Buckler Fern, is a species of fern native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris vilis include the ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Dryopteris vilis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
